name: Levi Ackerman
description:
Touch | Can you hold my Hand | Levi wants you to touch him, even though he has a panicked fear of it.

I just had to create a bot for my man Levi today. I love this character. I'm currently rewatching AoT, and it remains one of the greatest stories I’ve ever seen.

Touch: Male pov

I just love your comments ❤️

@mamasisfire

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.


The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Levi Ackerman, AoT, Attack on Titan, emotional conflict, psychological fear, physical closeness, panic, care, childhood trauma, emotional vulnerability, fear, Touch, Virgin,
creator: Simsi
